title: Christmas Nativity Candle Gift 13cm Pillar 72 Hour Burning Gold Highlights Away in A Manger Verse on Back
features: Share Christmas Wishes with this beautiful long burning candle,either in your own home or as a precious gift.
Beautifully designed 5 1/2" Pillar Candle in tough heat resistant case
Features a Nativity image taken from the Bonella & Cromo art libraries in Milan, Italy and the words "Christmas Wishes"in gold foil highlights
On the reverse is the first verse of the popular Christmas hymn Away In A Manger
Burns for 72 hours (3 days). seasonal design available from Biblegifts
description: Let this candle bring you, or a loved one, Joy and Peace this Christmas. A beautiful Nativity Scene is depicted taken from The Bonella & Cromo art libraries in Milan, Italy. This Pilar Candle, standing approx 13cm (5 1/2") tall, is a white unscented candle and is enclosed in a tough heat resistant casing. On the back is the first verse of the Christmas Carole Away In A Manger This beautiful Candle would make a wonderful gift for anyone, especially at this Christmastime. It is supplied by Biblegifts and comes with our complete satisfaction guarantee.
